items.translated_title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO?
items.content: Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world's most valuable companies, but if you're not a dedicated Apple enthusiast, you've probably never heard of this man, who has largely remained out of the spotlight until now.

items.translated_title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return

items.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
items.creator: Ivan Mehta
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
items.content: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

items.title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
items.creator: Amanda Silberling
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
items.content: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a company that many industry watchers and enthusiasts struggled to separate from its famed founder. What he leaves behind is a $4 trillion business with annual revenue that has more than quadrupled on his watch.

items.translated_title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes

items.title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
items.creator: Amanda Silberling
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing

images.alt: render of a robot typing on a typewriter.

items.content: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

items.translated_title: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
